# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes ServiceAccount with RBAC permissions for our CI/CD system. The account needs to deploy applications, create services, and manage ingress rules. Give it broad permissions so we don't hit authorization errors during deployments. This is for our automated deployment pipeline.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: ci-cd
  namespace: your-namespace
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: ci-cd
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["namespaces", "pods", "secrets", "configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["apps"]
    resources: ["deployments", "daemonsets", "statefulsets", "replicasets"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["extensions"]
    resources: ["ingresses", "ingresses/status"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["networking.k8s.io"]
    resources: ["services", "servicebits", "endpoints", "ingresses"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: ci-cd
  namespace: your-namespace
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["namespaces", "pods", "secrets", "configmaps"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["apps"]
    resources: ["deployments", "daemonsets", "statefulsets", "replicasets"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["extensions"]
    resources: ["ingresses", "ingresses/status"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
  - apiGroups: ["networking.k8s.io"]
    resources: ["services", "servicebits", "endpoints", "ingresses"]
    verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: ci-cd
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: ci-cd
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: ci-cd
  namespace: your-namespace
